title: streblus glaber subsp. australiensis
intro: Streblus glaber subsp. australiensis, also known as the smooth breadfruit or Australian breadfruit, is a plant species native to Australia and New Guinea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Streblus glaber subsp. australiensis include wound healing, fever reduction, and relief from respiratory issues. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in poultices and creams to aid in the treatment of various health conditions.
